name: Highlevel
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with HighLevel
metaTitle: Build AI Agents for HighLevel with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use HighLevel to answer customers, update records, trigger workflows, and help teams complete sales and support tasks safely.
intro: HighLevel brings CRM, messaging, scheduling, payments, and workflow automation into one operating system for growing businesses. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the outcome you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill that lets your AI agent safely use HighLevel data and actions. This helps customer-facing support agents and internal team assistants move from answering questions to completing approved work.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up contact, opportunity, appointment, invoice, or conversation details in HighLevel while answering support questions in chat or tickets.
Use the agent to create or update HighLevel contacts, notes, tags, and pipeline fields when customers provide new information during a support conversation.
Have the agent summarize a customer's recent HighLevel activity, including messages, appointments, and deal status, to prepare a clean handoff for a human teammate.
Allow the agent to trigger approved HighLevel workflows such as follow-up sequences, appointment reminders, or re-engagement automations after confirming the right conditions.
Use the agent to capture lead qualification details in chat and write them into HighLevel so sales or success teams receive a ready-to-work record instead of a raw transcript.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve HighLevel contact history, pipeline status, campaign activity, or appointment context without switching tools.
Give sales, support, and operations teams an internal AI assistant that updates notes, tags, custom fields, and follow-up tasks in HighLevel through guided chat workflows.
Help team members research account activity across conversations, opportunities, invoices, and workflows in HighLevel, then return a concise summary with recommended next steps.
Enable employees in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or a private chat to trigger approved HighLevel automations, create records, or prepare escalation handoffs while following internal SOPs.
Use an internal agent to standardize lead intake, renewal prep, missed-appointment follow-up, and customer recovery workflows by collecting missing details and completing the right HighLevel actions.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that checks HighLevel contact and appointment status before replying to customers.
A lead intake assistant that captures qualification answers and creates or enriches HighLevel records.
An internal sales copilot that summarizes pipeline changes and recommends the next approved action.
A customer success agent that tags accounts and triggers follow-up workflows after support conversations.
A renewal prep assistant that gathers account history from HighLevel and drafts handoff summaries.
A missed-call or missed-meeting recovery agent that launches approved HighLevel follow-up automations safely.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the agent to do with HighLevel in plain language, such as looking up contact details, updating records, or triggering a follow-up workflow.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable Skill, decides the safest workflow design, identifies the needed HighLevel configuration values, and sets up secure authentication handling without exposing credentials in chats or source.

howItWorks.title: Security is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, scopes access to the minimum records and actions required, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive HighLevel updates or workflow triggers.

howItWorks.title: Automated testing improves it
howItWorks.description: DocsBot's testing agent runs imagined customer and employee scenarios against the Skill, finds bugs, weak instructions, or permission gaps, and feeds those results into an automated self-improvement loop before deployment.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once ready, Skill Builder helps publish the Skill to your customer-facing DocsBot, helpdesk agent, or internal team assistant so it can answer questions and take bounded action inside HighLevel.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with HighLevel?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the HighLevel workflow you want in plain language, and DocsBot designs a reusable Skill that can look up data, update records, trigger approved actions, and respond through your support or internal agent. Skill Builder also handles secure connection setup, scoped permissions, testing, and deployment guidance.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use HighLevel data while chatting with customers?
faq.answer: Yes. A DocsBot support agent can use a HighLevel Skill to retrieve contact details, appointment status, pipeline context, conversation history, or invoice-related information while replying to customers in a website chat widget or helpdesk flow.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with HighLevel?
faq.answer: You can build workflows for contact lookup, appointment confirmation, lead qualification capture, account note updates, handoff preparation, and approved follow-up automation triggers. The agent can summarize what happened and pass structured context to a human when needed.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant update HighLevel records for employees?
faq.answer: Yes, with the permissions and approval limits you define. Employees can chat with a private DocsBot agent to add notes, apply tags, update fields, create follow-up tasks, or trigger approved HighLevel workflows without working directly inside the CRM.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep HighLevel actions safe?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines secure authentication handling, keeps secrets out of chat transcripts and generated content, scopes access to the minimum necessary records and actions, and can require approvals for sensitive updates or workflow triggers. This helps your agent act inside clear business rules instead of having broad unrestricted access.

faq.question: Can DocsBot trigger HighLevel automations from a support or internal conversation?
faq.answer: Yes. A Skill can be designed so the agent starts approved HighLevel workflows such as reminders, nurture sequences, follow-up campaigns, or recovery flows when the right conditions are met and your rules allow it.

brand.title: HighLevel
brand.description: HighLevel is an AI‑powered business operating system that provides an all‑in‑one platform for small‑to‑medium businesses and marketers to capture, nurture, and close leads. The suite combines CRM, voice and conversation AI, website and funnel builders, ad management, automated workflows, appointment scheduling, invoicing, payment processing, reputation management, and loyalty tools. By integrating these functions into a single cloud‑based solution, HighLevel helps businesses streamline marketing, sales, and customer retention, reducing the need for multiple disparate tools. The platform also offers community resources, training, and a marketplace for agencies, enabling users to scale operations, automate outreach, and grow revenue efficiently.
